title: hibbertia spanantha
intro: Hibbertia spanantha, also known as Guinea flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Australian medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hibbertia spanantha include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial activity, making it a popular choice for topical applications and oral consumption. Hibbertia spanantha is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal and cosmetic uses.
